draft: Dear Officer: I am writing this letter to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Mehta's visa petition. Mr. Mehta is an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of decarbonization technology, as evidenced by his remarkable achievements and contributions to the industry. As the CEO and Co-Founder of Beacon Dynamics, I have had the privilege of working closely with numerous entrepreneurs and startup founders. Beacon Dynamics is a company based in the San Francisco Bay Area that has launched over 1,000 startups and helped them raise more than $2 billion. Our mission is to help talented individuals start and scale companies by providing them with the resources, mentorship, and community they need to succeed. Before my current role, I co-founded Beacon Dynamics and served from January 2018 to August 2023, during which I helped shape the company's direction and growth, focusing on startup incubation and venture capital. Since May 2020, I have been actively supporting founders, having backed over 150 companies through personal investments, my fund, and my syndicate. This includes a diverse range of startups like Navigator, Sprout, and Starforge, indicating my broad influence and commitment to nurturing new businesses. In addition to my work at Beacon Dynamics, I have been publishing a free newsletter called "Insights with Founders" since June 2023. This newsletter aims to share insights and tactics with other founders, demonstrating my commitment to education and mentorship within the startup community. My previous experience includes working in growth roles at Zenith Health from April 2018 to January 2019, a company focused on reversing type 2 diabetes, indicating my experience in scaling health-focused startups. I also co-founded Harmony Health, where I was involved from March 2015 to July 2017 in providing on-site employee nutrition coaching, showcasing my entrepreneurial spirit and ability to innovate within the health sector. I first became acquainted with Mr. Mehta through his application to the highly selective Beacon Founders Fellowship, of which I am the CEO and Co-Founder. Beacon Founders is a prestigious program designed to support and nurture talented entrepreneurs in building and scaling their startups. With an acceptance rate of less than 3%, the program is incredibly competitive, attracting thousands of applicants from around the world. Mr. Mehta's application stood out due to his impressive background and achievements in the field of decarbonization technology. As the Founder and CEO of echo tech, he has demonstrated extraordinary ability in developing innovative solutions to address climate change. His work in carbon capture and long-duration energy storage has garnered significant attention and recognition within the industry. echo tech is a deep tech startup focused on developing advanced decarbonization technologies. Under Mr. Mehta's leadership, the company has made remarkable strides in creating low-cost and compact carbon capture systems, as well as long-duration energy storage solutions. These innovations have the potential to significantly reduce greenhouse gas emissions and contribute to a more sustainable future. One of the key factors that led to Mr. Mehta's acceptance into the Beacon Founders Fellowship was his extraordinary technical abilities and entrepreneurial achievements. His extensive experience in developing and implementing cutting-edge technologies in the field of decarbonization is truly impressive. Mr. Mehta has a proven track record of successfully bringing innovative solutions to market, as evidenced by his work at echo tech. Mr. Mehta's expertise in carbon capture and energy storage is unparalleled. He has developed a breakthrough low-cost and compact carbon capture technology based on a centrifugal packed bed system. This innovative approach significantly reduces the size and cost of carbon capture systems, making them more accessible and feasible for widespread adoption. Furthermore, Mr. Mehta has also invented advanced carbon capture formulations that enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of these systems. In addition to his work in carbon capture, Mr. Mehta has made significant contributions to the field of energy storage. He has developed a 100 KWh long-duration energy storage system that addresses the challenges of storing intermittent solar and wind energy. This system not only helps stabilize the grid but also promotes the use of renewable energy sources, thereby reducing reliance on fossil fuels. Mr. Mehta's entrepreneurial achievements extend beyond his technical expertise. He has successfully led echo tech in securing contracts and partnerships with major industrial clients. For instance, echo tech has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) for the feasibility study and potential implementation of their carbon capture technology at BPCL's facilities. This collaboration with one of India's largest energy companies underscores the credibility and potential impact of Mr. Mehta's innovations. Furthermore, echo tech has also entered into an MOU with Larsen & Toubro Limited (L&T), a leading engineering and construction company, for the implementation of their carbon capture technology for industrial clients. This partnership highlights the scalability and adaptability of Mr. Mehta's solutions across various industries. Mr. Mehta's ability to secure such high-profile collaborations is a testament to his extraordinary ability as a founder and leader. His vision and dedication to addressing climate change through innovative technologies have positioned echo tech as a frontrunner in the decarbonization space. In addition to his technical and entrepreneurial achievements, Mr. Mehta has demonstrated a strong commitment to sharing his knowledge and expertise with the broader community. He has published numerous research papers in reputable journals, contributing valuable insights to the fields of carbon capture and energy storage. His research has been recognized for its rigor and impact, further solidifying his reputation as a thought leader in the industry. Mr. Mehta's commitment to mentorship and knowledge sharing extends beyond his research publications. He actively participates in industry conferences and events, where he shares his insights and experiences with fellow entrepreneurs and industry professionals. His willingness to engage with the community and support the growth of others in the field is a testament to his character and dedication to advancing the decarbonization agenda. Moreover, Mr. Mehta's leadership skills and ability to inspire and motivate his team have been instrumental in echo tech's success. He has built a talented and dedicated team of engineers, scientists, and business professionals who share his vision and drive to make a positive impact on the environment. Under his guidance, echo tech has fostered a culture of innovation and collaboration, enabling the company to continuously push the boundaries of what is possible in the field of decarbonization. Mr. Mehta's extraordinary ability to combine technical expertise with entrepreneurial acumen and a commitment to mentorship and knowledge sharing makes him an invaluable asset to the decarbonization industry. His work at echo tech is not only advancing the state of the art in carbon capture and energy storage but also inspiring the next generation of innovators to tackle the pressing challenges of climate change. In conclusion, Mr. Mehta's acceptance into the highly selective Beacon Founders Fellowship is a testament to his extraordinary abilities and achievements in the field of decarbonization technology. His innovative work at echo tech, combined with his entrepreneurial acumen and commitment to mentorship, make him an invaluable asset to the industry. I am confident that Mr. Mehta will continue to make significant contributions to the field and drive meaningful progress toward a more sustainable future. I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Mehta for his visa petition. His extraordinary abilities and accomplishments in the field of decarbonization technology make him an invaluable asset to the United States. I am confident that he will continue to make significant contributions to the industry and drive meaningful progress toward a more sustainable future. Sincerely, Ethan Cole CEO and Co-Founder Beacon Dynamics [email contact here]
final: Dear Officer: I am writing this letter to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Mehta's visa petition. Mr. Mehta is a distinguished Entrepreneur and Product Manager with extraordinary expertise in emerging technologies, particularly in climate tech, fintech, and AI. His remarkable achievements and substantial contributions to these industries underscore his exceptional abilities and impact. As a seasoned entrepreneur, investor, and startup advisor known for my contributions to the tech and venture capital ecosystem, I am well-acquainted with the caliber of talent required to excel in this field. As a co-founder and CEO of Beacon Founders (Beacon Founders), I have helped build a platform that empowers founders by connecting them with the right talent, investors, and resources to scale their ventures. In addition to Beacon Founders, I have co-founded several other companies, including Harmony Health, which leverages behavioral science to support individuals with chronic conditions, and Connect, a platform providing microgrants to promising projects. I also launched Work Visa Hub, a resource designed to assist job seekers requiring visa sponsorship. Over the years, I have actively invested in and advised numerous early-stage startups across industries such as decentralized finance, health tech, and artificial intelligence. My passion lies in identifying transformative opportunities, supporting high-potential founders, and helping innovative companies navigate the challenges of early-stage growth. Through my work with the Beacon Founders Fellowship, based in the San Francisco Bay Area, I have been instrumental in supporting founders by backing over 150 companies through investments, a dedicated fund, and a syndicate. This support spans a diverse range of startups, including Navigator, Sprout, and Starforge, highlighting my extensive influence and commitment to nurturing new ventures. With a record of launching more than 1,000 startups and aiding them in raising over $2 billion, Beacon Founders' mission is to empower talented individuals to start and scale companies by providing essential resources, mentorship, and a supportive community. I initially got to know Mr. Mehta through his participation in our highly selective Beacon Founders Fellowship program. This prestigious initiative is specifically designed to support and nurture promising entrepreneurs in the crucial stages of building and scaling their startups. The fellowship provides unparalleled access to a curated community of ambitious peers, experienced mentors, and potential investors, fostering an environment where collaboration and innovation can flourish. Through its structured programming, which includes expert-led workshops, fireside chats, and personalized mentorship sessions, Beacon Founders assists participants in refining their ideas, securing product-market fit, and overcoming early-stage challenges. Additionally, the fellowship offers critical fundraising support, linking founders with venture capitalists and angel investors to spur their growth trajectory. Admission to the Beacon Founders program is extremely competitive, with applicants assessed on their entrepreneurial potential, domain expertise, problem-solving skills, and dedication to building impactful ventures. The selection process gives preference to individuals with a strong track record of execution evidenced by past startups, industry leadership, or groundbreaking projects. By encouraging accountability, facilitating execution, and providing a strong support network, the Beacon Founders Fellowship acts as a launchpad for high-potential startups, equipping entrepreneurs with the vital resources and connections needed to thrive in the competitive startup ecosystem. Mr. Mehta's acceptance into the highly competitive Beacon Founders Fellowship speaks volumes about his remarkable expertise and accomplishments in emerging technology. Standing out among thousands of applicants, his exceptional entrepreneurial acumen, deep domain knowledge, and robust problem-solving skills were particularly noteworthy. This recognition affirms his status as a frontrunner in the field, providing him access to invaluable resources and a network poised to amplify his innovative contributions. His impressive track record of pioneering solutions, as demonstrated through his work at echo tech, underscores his ability to effectively drive transformation within his industry. As the Founder and CEO of echo tech, Mr. Mehta is instrumental in driving the company's mission to combat climate change through innovative technologies. His leadership has been key in steering the company toward remarkable achievements in carbon capture and long-duration energy storage, gaining significant industry attention and recognition. echo tech operates as a deep tech startup, employing cutting-edge ideas to create advanced decarbonization technologies. Under his guidance, the company has made significant progress in developing low-cost and compact carbon capture systems, alongside long-duration energy storage solutions. These innovations are poised to considerably reduce greenhouse gas emissions, contributing to a more sustainable future. Mr. Mehta’s ability to inspire and motivate a talented team of engineers, scientists, and business professionals at echo tech has been instrumental in the company's success. His leadership has fostered a culture of innovation and collaboration, continually pushing the boundaries of what is possible in the field of decarbonization. By building a dedicated team that shares his vision of making a positive environmental impact, he ensures the company remains at the forefront of technological advancements in the sector. His proven track record of successfully bringing innovative solutions to market is a testament to his exceptional capabilities and strategic insight. In the broader field of emerging technology, specifically climate tech and decarbonization technology, Mr. Mehta's contributions through echo tech have been truly groundbreaking. He has pioneered a patented, low-cost, and compact carbon capture technology based on a centrifugal packed bed system, significantly enhancing the accessibility and feasibility of such solutions for widespread adoption. Additionally, his development of advanced carbon capture formulations has markedly improved the efficiency and effectiveness of these systems, setting new standards within the industry. Beyond carbon capture, Mr. Mehta has also made profound contributions to energy storage. He developed a 100 KWh long-duration energy storage system that effectively addresses the challenges of storing intermittent solar and wind energy. This innovation not only aids in grid stabilization but also encourages the use of renewable energy sources, thereby diminishing reliance on fossil fuels. His expertise and entrepreneurial achievements are reinforced by high-profile collaborations, such as MOUs with Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) and Larsen & Toubro Limited (L&T), which highlight the credibility, scalability, and impact of his solutions across various industrial sectors, firmly establishing echo tech as a leader in the decarbonization space. At Corellium, Mr. Mehta served a pivotal role as a Product Manager in the Core Technologies group, where his leadership and strategic acumen were instrumental in launching key product developments that significantly enhanced Corellium's offerings. He led the development of the Corellium Journey Optimizer, a vital tool that utilized data-driven insights to optimize customer engagement. His proficiency in areas like DMARC engineering fortified Corellium’s technological framework, ensuring both robustness and security. Furthermore, his contributions to the development of the Corellium Campaign Product and API-triggered transactional systems showcased his ability to deliver groundbreaking solutions aligned with Corellium’s strategic objectives in the realm of emerging technology. Through his work at Corellium, Mr. Mehta made lasting contributions to the digital and emerging technology landscape. His development of products such as the Corellium Journey Optimizer and Corellium Campaign Product demonstrated his skill in applying data-driven and analytical strategies to improve consumer interactions. These competencies play a pivotal role in advancing emerging technologies, where integrating cutting-edge solutions with user-centric design is essential. His engineering of secure, efficient systems at Corellium underscores his commitment to innovation, a commitment that he carries into his broader technological endeavors. At PulseCare, Mr. Mehta excelled as a Product Manager, where he was central to the company's product innovation and strategy efforts. His leadership facilitated the development of solutions that enhanced operational efficiencies and improved patient experiences, showcasing his ability to handle complex technological projects with effectiveness and clarity. This role further sharpened his skills in user-centric product development, enabling him to translate complex technical ideas into practical, user-friendly applications—skills essential for driving advancements in emerging technology sectors. In addition to his notable roles at echo tech, Corellium, and PulseCare, Mr. Mehta has made substantial contributions to the emerging technology landscape through his founding of LoopPay, a fintech startup acquired by CipherWave. LoopPay was created to address affordability challenges for low- to middle-income renters by leveraging machine learning and data science. Mr. Mehta pioneered solutions to eliminate the need for a security deposit when renting, thus making home renting more accessible and affordable. This approach not only utilized cutting-edge financial technology but also demonstrated an innovative application of emerging technologies to solve real-world problems. Outside of his professional responsibilities, Mr. Mehta is affiliated with several prestigious networks, including the Entrepreneur First Membership, Cleantech Open Network, and Innovators Guild Network. These memberships are highly selective and serve as a testament to his expertise and influence in the field of emerging technology. Being part of these networks provides him with access to essential resources, mentorship, and collaborative opportunities, supporting his steadfast dedication to pioneering innovation and leadership in the emerging tech field and further magnifying his contributions to technological progress and societal advancement. In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Mehta for his visa petition. His extraordinary abilities and accomplishments in the field of emerging technology make him an invaluable asset to the United States. I am confident that he will continue to make significant contributions to the industry and drive meaningful progress toward a more sustainable future. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need more details or further clarification. Sincerely, Ethan Cole CEO and Co-Founder Beacon Founders
